name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       /\ states[i] = THINKING
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
       /\ forks' = forks
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
       /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
       /\ forks[i] = 0
       /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
    \/ (* Philosopher i stops eating *)
       /\ states[i] = EATING
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                    /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                    /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES kvStore

Init == 
  /\ kvStore \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: kvStore[k] = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
       /\ kvStore' = [kvStore EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ /\ \E k \in Keys:
       /\ kvStore' = kvStore

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kvStore>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenBy, chosenByBallot, chosenByValue, chosenByBallotValue

Init == /\ acceptors = <<>>

        /\ chosen = <<>>
        /\ chosenBallot = <<>>
        /\ chosenBy = <<>>
        /\ chosenByBallot = <<>>
        /\ chosenByValue = <<>>
        /\ chosenByBallotValue = <<>>

Next == /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ promises' = promises
        /\ accepted' = accepted
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
        /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy
        /\ chosenByBallot' = chosenByBallot
        /\ chosenByValue' = chosenByValue
        /\ chosenByBallotValue' = chosenByBallotValue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenBy, chosenByBallot, chosenByValue, chosenByBallotValue>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunkSize, totalChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks

Init == /\ file \in Seq
        /\ chunkSize \in Nat
        /\ totalChunks = Ceil[Len[file] / chunkSize]
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next == /\ sentChunks' == AppendsentChunks..chunk
        /\ retransmitCount' = IF chunk \in sentChunks THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE 0
        /\ receivedChunks' = IF Random < 0.5 THEN receivedChunks ELSE AppendreceivedChunks..chunk
        /\ chunk = IF Len[sentChunks] < totalChunks THEN [x \in 1..chunkSize |-> file[Len[sentChunks] * chunkSize + x]] ELSE <<>>
        /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, totalChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>
